summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Gold Jewellery Sales application. Tested login with admin credentials, admin dashboard functionality, rate management, branch creation, user creation, item name management, executive login, sales dashboard, and item calculator. Backend API shows 88% success rate with bill ID mismatch issue. Frontend UI works perfectly with proper navigation and real-time calculations.

critical_bugs.issue: Bill update/retrieval fails with 404 after creation - UUID/ObjectID mismatch in MongoDB queries
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents bill editing, PDF generation, and sending bills to manager
critical_bugs.details: Bills are created successfully but cannot be retrieved by ID. Backend uses UUIDs in API but may have ObjectID mismatch in database queries.

integration_issues.issue: Bill editing, PDF generation limited due to backend bill ID issue

passed_tests: Add Item Names (Necklace, Ring, Bangle, Pendant)
Calculate Gold Item with making/stone charges
Item Calculator Multi-step Flow (Gold/Diamond types, rate modes, purity selection)
Real-time calculation engine (gold value, making charges, stone charges)
Frontend-Backend integration for rates and item names

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All UI components functional, limited by backend bill issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix MongoDB bill ID lookup issue in backend - Bills are created with UUIDs but queries may be using ObjectIDs. Check server.py lines 526, 562-563 for bill.find_one({"id": bill_id}) operations. The serialize_doc function converts ObjectId to string but queries still expect string ID format.
